ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region to which the country belongs */,
  "subregion" TEXT /* Subregion to which the country belongs */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Year for which data is available */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the year */,
  "fiscal_year" TEXT /* Fiscal year (if different from the calendar year) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "happiness_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each happiness score record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "happiness_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the country in the happiness index */,
  "happiness_score" REAL /* Happiness score of the country */,
  "dystopia_residual" REAL /* Dystopia residual value for the country */,
  "health_life_expectancy" REAL /* Health-adjusted life expectancy */,
  "freedom_to_make_life_choices" REAL /* Freedom to make life choices score */,
  "perceptions_of_corruption" REAL /* Perceptions of corruption score */,
  "social_support" REAL /* Social support score */,
  "generosity" REAL /* Generosity score */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_happiness_scores_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_happiness_scores_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wealth_indicators" (
  "wealth_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wealth indicator record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "billionaires" INTEGER /* Number of billionaires in the country */,
  "sum_net_worth" REAL /* Sum of the net worth of billionaires in the country */,
  "rate" REAL /* Rate of billionaires per capita */,
  "total_assets" REAL /* Total assets of the billionaires */,
  "total_liabilities" REAL /* Total liabilities of the billionaires */,
  "net_worth_change" REAL /* Change in net worth from the previous year */,
  "wealth_distribution_index" REAL /* Wealth distribution index within the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wealth_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wealth_indicators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wealth_indicators_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "economic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita of the country */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Life expectancy at birth in the country */,
  "freedom" REAL /* Freedom score in the country */,
  "government_corruption" REAL /* Government corruption score in the country */,
  "generosity" REAL /* Generosity score in the country */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate in the country */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the country */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate in the country */,
  "education_index" REAL /* Education index in the country */,
  "health_index" REAL /* Health index in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("economic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, policymaker, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or organization the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's device */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data source was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the data source */,
  "reliability_rating" TEXT /* Reliability rating for the data source */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., CSV, JSON, XML) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_references" (
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data reference */,
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the happiness score record */,
  "wealth_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the wealth indicator record */,
  "economic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the economic indicator record */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the data */,
  "last_accessed" TEXT /* Date when the data was last accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_references_wealth_id FOREIGN KEY ("wealth_id") REFERENCES wealth_indicators ("wealth_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_references_economic_id FOREIGN KEY ("economic_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("economic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_references_score_id FOREIGN KEY ("score_id") REFERENCES happiness_scores ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_references_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)
